/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hft_engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_engine.dir/src/orderbook.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hft_engine.dir/src/engine.cpp.o -o hft_engine
